# Test Fixtures

This directory holds pre-computed reference NetCDF output from the original
CLIMBER-X GOLDSTEIN Fortran model. These files are used to validate the
Pelagos.jl implementation to within the tolerances specified in CLAUDE.md.

## Expected files

| File | Contents | Model time |
|---|---|---|
| `snapshot_year0010.nc` | Full 3D ocean state | Year 10 of spinup |
| `snapshot_year0100.nc` | Full 3D ocean state | Year 100 of spinup |
| `snapshot_year1000.nc` | Full 3D ocean state | Year 1000 of spinup |

## Variables

| Variable | Description | Units |
|---|---|---|
| `ocn_temp` | Potential temperature | °C |
| `ocn_salt` | Salinity | psu |
| `ocn_u` | Zonal velocity | m s⁻¹ |
| `ocn_v` | Meridional velocity | m s⁻¹ |
| `ocn_w` | Vertical velocity | m s⁻¹ |
| `ocn_psi_bt` | Barotropic streamfunction | m² s⁻¹ |
| `ocn_psi_moc` | Meridional overturning streamfunction (zonal mean) | m² s⁻¹ |
| `ocn_pressure` | Hydrostatic pressure | bar |
| `ocn_rho` | In-situ density | kg m⁻³ |
| `lon` | Longitude of cell centres | degrees east |
| `lat` | Latitude of cell centres | degrees north |
| `z` | Depth of cell centres | m (negative downward) |

## How fixtures were generated

Fixtures are generated by running the CLIMBER-X v1.0 Fortran model for the
specified number of years from a prescribed initial state, with present-day
forcing (NCEP climatology for wind stress and heat flux; Levitus climatology
for T/S initial conditions).

The CLIMBER-X repository is at: https://github.com/cxesmc/climber-x

To regenerate fixtures, run the CLIMBER-X model with the default namelist
(present-day control run), and extract the ocean state at years 10, 100, and
1000 using the CLIMBER-X post-processing scripts.

## Notes

- Fixtures are **not** committed to the repository due to file size.
- To run the fixture-based integration tests, obtain the fixture files from
  the project maintainer and place them in this directory.
- Tests in `test/integration/test_spinup.jl` and related files will
  automatically skip if fixture files are absent.
